Short CV

Tuğrul Tansuğ graduated from Ege University Faculty of Medicine in 1982. He completed his specialty education in the Department of General Surgery in 1990. He received the title of Associate Professor in 2001. He is currently working as a Professor at Üsküdar University Faculty of Medicine, Department of General Surgery.
